license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y9vfz66
title: PEI Transfection
author: Nobody

steps_raw.instruction: Split cells into wells - see relevant protocol
Make a solution of - 500ng transfection DNA - 2.5ul PET - Serum Free Media (OptiMEM) up to 50ul
Vortex solution twice for 5 seconds Leave solution to incubate in hood for 15 minutes Add 50ul of solution per well (500ul) Incubate for 24-48hrs
View fluorescence under microscope Fix cells
